name: Proline Bentonite Clumping Activated Carbon Cat Litter 10l
description: Proline Bentonite Cat Litter with Activated Carbon is a 100% natural bentonite clumping litter that instantly forms tight clumps to trap urine and odor. The activated carbon helps to absorb odors and create a fresh and clean atmosphere in your home. The thin grain shape of the litter helps to prevent tracking, and the litter is non-toxic and safe for your cat. Key Benefits: 100% natural bentonite clay Instantly clumps to trap urine and odor. Activated carbon absorbs odors. Thin grain shape prevents tracking. Non-toxic and safe for cats Recommended to add new litter to the surface of the old litter for a few days when first using Guarantee: We are so confident that you and your cat will love Proline Bentonite Cat Litter with Activated Carbon that we offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you are not happy with your purchase for any reason, simply return it for a full refund. Give your cat the best with Proline Bentonite Cat Litter with Activated Carbon!
